regions.text: Through about two billion years the development of plants and animals has been going on. At first both were very small, much less than a pin point in size.
The first plants or animals were bodies living in one-roomed houses (cells). They do not give birth but divide to become two daughter cells.
These three pictures show the division of a cell into two separate cells each of which may in turn divide into two more.

much less: a great amount less. show: make clear. division: becoming two. separate: not together. divide: become two. FUTURE: will divide/show. PRESENT: divide(s)/shows(s). PAST: divided/showed, shown.
